channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I tested Noble’s new ‘budget’ earbuds and I'd love to say they'll wow audiophiles, but it’s impossible to keep them in long enough to know
item.description: The Noble Osprey look and sound great, but fit issues result in an infuriating listening experience.

item.title: Attention, Nvidia GPU users — you need to be wary of riser cable setups, especially when using an RTX 5090
item.description: It's not a melting connector-level concern, but proceed with caution if you're using an RTX 5090 GPU with a riser cable for your gaming PC setup.
